| `vals` | âś… supported | Returns map values |  |

| `vector?` | âś… supported | Returns true if vector |  |

| `when-first` | âś… supported | Evaluates body if seq non-empty |  |
| `when-let` | âś… supported | Binds if truthy, evaluates body |  |

| `with-redefs` | âťŚ not_relevant | Redefines vars for body duration | modifies global var bindings, which is not supported in a functional, immutable sandbox |
| `xml-seq` | âťŚ not_relevant | Lazy seq of XML elements | relies on lazy sequences and I/O-related parsing |
| `zero?` | âś… supported | Returns true if number is zero |  |
| `zipmap` | âś… supported | Creates map from keys and values seqs |  |
